Mon – Fri: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

What They Say

Thank you so much for the excellent haircut! I truly appreciate the attention to detail and the great conversation. You have a real talent for your craft and I'll definitely be returning for my next haircut. Keep up the fantastic work!

— Bryant A

He did an outstanding job on my beard trim. He took his time, paid attention to detail, and made sure everything was lined up perfectly. Super friendly, professional, and you can tell he takes pride in his work. I walked out looking sharp and feeling great. Top-quality service!

— Brian Milburn

Been going here over a year now getting my haircut and he always does an excellent job! He knows his stuff and is good about making suggestions on what would work best for me. If you are in the Allen/Lucas area I highly recommend!

— Grayson Morgan

We love the barber shop! All the barbers are great. My super picky 14 year old son only trusts Miguel with his hair!

— Amber Gallegos

Awesome experience. Super clean shop and everyone is really nice. My two year old son and I go to Miguel. 100% would recommend

— kyle Connors

I have been going to see Miguel for several years now at Señor brims and don’t see myself working with anyone else to cut my hair. Great barbers, great atmosphere, and a really great haircut.

— John Gallent

Get In Touch

☎ Phone (469) 675 – 3183 ✉ Email ◉ Instagram @mc.thebarber

Please Note

  • Walk-ins are always welcome, subject to barber availability. Appointments are recommended to guarantee your preferred time.

Frequently Asked Questions

We highly recommend booking an appointment to ensure your spot and minimize your wait time. To guarantee your preferred time, we encourage scheduling in advance through our online booking system.

We accept cash, debit/credit cards, and some mobile payments.

Select the service you are interested in from this link that takes you to the booking page: Link to book appointment Page..

Yes, you can contact the barber through message in the square appointment site where the appointment was created, call to the barbershop at: (469) 675-3183.

We prioritize the health and safety of our clients and staff by maintaining the highest standards of cleanliness. All tools and equipment are sanitized and disinfected after each use, following industry guidelines. Our workstations are cleaned regularly throughout the day, and we use disposable or single-use items whenever possible, such as neck strips and blades.

There is a grace period of 15 min, if the client doesnt arrive by that time you will need to reschedule and forfeit.
